rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE MATTHEW E.G. KELLY REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Construction & Modification Of Trust; & For Allocation Of Investment & Trustee Fees Between Life Income Beneficiaries & Charitable Remain
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/13/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of any petition filed conventionally to initiate a case needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T, 14.91F]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
